entity.Name: Contact

Description.description: This is student contact form
Type the primary email address for the contact.
Value of the Final CTC in base currency.
This is the introduction of the student

entity.MobileOfflineFilters: <fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false"> <entity name="contact"> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="last-x-days" value="10"/> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

Description.description: A form for this entity.
This form is used by the portal for the user to update their contact info

Title.Text: ใบเสนอราคา
ใบแจ้งหนี้
ダイアログ セッション
เซสชันของกล่องโต้ตอบ
เวิร์กโฟลว์

Description.description: Updated default Contact form.
This form is used by the portal with Japanese localization for the user to update their contact info

Role.name: Recruitment Basic user
Role.Description: For out-of-the-box entities only, can run an app in the environment and perform common tasks on the records they own. It has privileges to the core business tables, such as Account, Contact, and Activity.
Role.SummaryOfCoreTablePermissions: The basic user for recruitment app
